profile.name: Shravan Kumar Tela
profile.title: Data Engineer
profile.description: Data Engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable ETL pipelines and cloud-native data platforms. Specialized in processing large-scale datasets, distributed systems, and performance optimization.

arsenal.description: PySpark, Pandas, NumPy, and advanced ETL patterns for high-throughput workloads.
AWS Lambda, Glue, S3, EMR, and Databricks. Infrastructure as Code with Terraform.
Python 3.x, PostgreSQL, SQL Optimization, System Design, and Dockerization.

journey.description: Architecting cloud-native batch systems and AI-assisted migration frameworks.
highlights: Designed and deployed a serverless batch processing architecture on AWS reducing operational overhead by 40%.
Built AI-assisted test automation suites that reduced manual QA efforts for legacy migrations by 80%.

journey.description: Engineering high-throughput processing engines for multi-gigabyte unstructured datasets.
highlights: Pioneered high-throughput data processing engines for unstructured CSV datasets.
Utilized multiprocessing and vectorized operations to handle multi-gigabyte files efficiently.

professional.title: Cloud-Native Batch System
professional.description: Architected an event-driven, serverless-first batch processing platform on AWS using Lambda, Batch, and Terraform.
professional.impact: Improved incident response by 60% through real-time monitoring and automated recovery.
details: Implemented a robust API → Lambda → Batch → S3 flow.
Used Flask for REST interfaces and managed job lifecycle states in DynamoDB.
Built a real-time notification engine using Google Chat Webhooks and CloudWatch.

professional.title: ETL Modernization
professional.description: Engineered a Python-based framework to replace legacy Oracle PL/SQL systems.
professional.impact: Integrated AI-assisted testing that reduced manual QA efforts by 80%.
details: Developed LLM-powered agents to auto-generate 80% of unit tests.
Decoupled business logic from Oracle-specific functions.
Ensured total functional parity with mission-critical legacy systems.

professional.title: Parallel CSV Processor
professional.description: Built a high-performance engine for cleansing and transforming massive (~3GB) unstructured datasets.
professional.impact: Achieved 70% runtime reduction using vectorized operations and multiprocessing.
details: Optimized concurrent API workloads via advanced multithreading patterns.
Leveraged vectorized operations in Pandas for massive speedups.
Implemented robust error handling for malformed dataset rows.

self_taught.title: Distributed Healthcare Pipeline
self_taught.description: Orchestrating 10GB+ patient data using Spark on AWS EMR.
self_taught.impact: Achieved 50% query speedup via Parquet partitioning and Athena optimization.
details: Deployed a distributed Spark cluster for CSV to Parquet conversion.
Leveraged lazy evaluation and broadcast joins for complex hospital-level aggregations.
Visualized trends via AWS QuickSight dashboards.

self_taught.title: Autonomous Data Agents
self_taught.description: Building ReAct-based agents for automated data quality checks and metadata discovery.
self_taught.impact: Experimental framework for autonomous data governance and metadata cataloging.
details: Developed LLM-powered agents for automated metadata extraction.
Implemented automated data quality rules generation.
Integrated with metadata catalogs for seamless discovery.
